Package org.patternfly.component

Class MultiOptionsMenu

java.lang.Object
org.patternfly.component.BaseComponent<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu>
org.patternfly.component.MultiOptionsMenu
All Implemented Interfaces:
Container<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu>, Finder<HTMLDivElement>, HasElement<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu>, HasHTMLElement<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu>, IsElement<HTMLDivElement>, TypedBuilder<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu>, Component, Modifiers.Disabled<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu>
@Deprecated public class MultiOptionsMenu extends BaseComponent<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu> implements Modifiers.Disabled<HTMLDivElement,MultiOptionsMenu>
Deprecated.
PatternFly options menu (grouped, multiple selections).
See Also:
